user.title: Sensor Entities
user.description: Select the entities for your energy and temperature data. Only indoor/outdoor temperature and electricity price are required.

data.heatpump_electricity_entity: Heat pump electricity sensor (optional, cumulative kWh)
data.electricity_price_entity: Electricity price sensor (Nordpool, ENTSO-e, or similar)

house_profile.title: House Profile
house_profile.description: Describe your house so the model can start with reasonable estimates. Refined automatically after 1-2 weeks of data.

parameters.title: Model Parameters
parameters.description: Only fields relevant to your setup are shown.

data.heating_hot_water_fraction: Fraction of gas for space heating (vs. hot water)
data.auto_control: Auto-control: push setpoints to thermostats automatically
data.training_window_days: Use N days of history for training

devices.title: Heating Devices
devices.description: Add your heating devices ({device_count} added so far).

data.name: Device name (e.g. 'Daikin', 'Climatherm', 'CV Ketel')
data.cop_data_str: COP data from spec sheet: outdoor_temp:COP pairs (e.g. -7:2.5, 2:3.2, 7:4.0)

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Check the entity ID.
